$comment: Files copied out of my-design-system-react. `sourceSha256` is the hash of the UPSTREAM file at the moment it was vendored — not of our local copy, which may carry an added header comment. `npm run check:ds` re-hashes upstream and fails if it has moved, which is the signal to re-vendor. Update this file whenever you re-copy.

files.localEdits: Added a vendor-provenance header comment above the imports.
